name: lust-for-life
description: Irving Stone's 'Lust for Life' — the classic biographical novel of Vincent van Gogh. His struggles, his art, his madness, and his brother Theo's devotion. Stone's masterpiece brings van Gogh's story to life: from the Borinage to Arles, from the Sunflowers to the Starry Night, from the ear to the final shot in the wheat field.
